title: FlamePack Sodium
description: Meet top performance here and now
body:
# Everything you need in one pack, You need FlamePack #

**If you think FlamePack will get the most out of your computer, you're right – it offers top-tier performance gains, more useful features, and is constantly being developed. Trust FlameTeam and see for yourself that these are not empty promises.**

**Still hungry for FPS? Try our side project, powered by the modern [Vulkan](https://modrinth.com/modpack/flamepack-revulkanized) graphics API, for a massive boost that you'll truly feel.**

![FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/198bf2ff17836dc79bce6ce9e5c6a4f0d39e16cc.png)
